studies.label: GET BAKED | CASE STUDY
studies.title:
SCALING A CULT UK
BAKERY BRAND
studies.description: Led brand and marketing for a cult UK bakery, scaling a disruptive, content-first challenger brand. Controlled cross-business workflows, socials, content, emails, print, packaging and e-commerce.

studies.label: CROSSFADER | CASE STUDY
studies.title:
GROWING A GLOBAL
MUSIC COMMUNITY
studies.description: Spearheaded international educational outlier in the music, DJ and event industry. Managed planning, creating, strategy and scheduling of all content across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Discord and Threads.
